summary: Frontend-only regression and responsive testing completed on http://127.0.0.1:3456 for Home refactor safety, gallery/partners visibility, and mobile vendor navigation. Requested flows are working.
action_items: Optional cleanup: remove unused HomeScreen imports/variables (Href/useRouter/router) to keep lint and maintainability clean.
Keep stable testIDs tied to non-copy constants for long-term E2E reliability.
critical_code_review_comments: HomeScreen.tsx currently imports Href and useRouter and initializes router, but they are unused after refactor.
Some testIDs in trust cards are derived from display copy, making selectors brittle if Indonesian copy is revised again.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend tested against local static build only (127.0.0.1:3456). MOCKED APIs present for n8n availability and booking submission webhooks.
rca_of_issue: Initial failed click was due to wrong selector targeting desktop-only featured vendor card on mobile. Switching to vendor-card-* selector resolved test script failure; app behavior is correct.
